findings.finding: Exact enclosure and cutout dimensions were not available in the allowed sanitized bundle; generated drawings remain schematic/TBD.
Reference-specific layout decisions could not be scored as source-supported because completed references were unavailable to the generator.
All three PDFs are internally consistent but minimal and not fabrication-ready.

comparison_limitations: No exact geometry overlay was produced because registration was not established as reliable.
Completed references are used only in reviewer workspace after generation freeze.
Scoring separates unavailable dimensions from unsupported invented values.
